top_articles.title: TrendAI Patches Apex One Zero-Day Exploited in the Wild
top_articles.summary: CVE-2026-34926 is a directory traversal flaw that can be exploited against the on-premise version of Apex One.

top_articles.title: Cisco Patches Critical Vulnerability in Secure Workload
top_articles.summary: Insufficient validation and authentication in the Secure Workload’s REST APIs provide remote attackers with Site Admin privileges.
